title: chrysolaena verbascifolia
intro: Chrysolaena verbascifolia, also known as Verbena or Brazilian Vervain, is a flowering plant native to South America, belonging to the Verbenaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Chrysolaena verbascifolia include reducing anxiety and stress, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-histamine properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
